evals.name: basic-digest-three-articles
evals.prompt: Build a digest for these articles. Input: {"digest_date": "2025-03-12", "max_items_per_section": 5, "total_max_items": 25, "articles": [{"id": "art_001", "title_ru": "Запуск второй фазы цифрового тенге", "summary": "Национальный банк РК запустил пилот.", "topics": ["cbdc", "regulation"], "country": "KZ", "geo_priority": 1, "priority": "high", "score": 78, "source_name": "nationalbank.kz", "source_url": "https://nationalbank.kz/123", "published_at": "2025-03-12T08:00:00+05:00"}, {"id": "art_002", "title_ru": "SEC обвинила Bittrex", "summary": "SEC предъявила обвинения криптобирже.", "topics": ["regulation", "exchanges"], "country": "US", "geo_priority": 3, "priority": "high", "score": 72, "source_name": "sec.gov", "source_url": "https://sec.gov/123", "published_at": "2025-03-12T14:00:00Z"}, {"id": "art_003", "title_ru": "Halyk Bank запустил услугу хранения крипто", "summary": "Народный банк представил новый сервис.", "topics": ["banks", "products"], "country": "KZ", "geo_priority": 1, "priority": "medium", "score": 58, "source_name": "halykbank.kz", "source_url": "https://halykbank.kz/123", "published_at": "2025-03-12T10:00:00+05:00"}]}
evals.expected_output: JSON с html, plain_text, telegram_segments. РК-новости в начале (regulation_kz, cbdc, banks); SEC-новость — в разделе биржи; правильная статистика.

evals.name: empty-section-handling
evals.prompt: Build a digest for these articles. Input: {"digest_date": "2025-03-13", "max_items_per_section": 5, "total_max_items": 25, "articles": [{"id": "art_010", "title_ru": "Bitcoin превысил $100k", "summary": "Биткоин достиг рекордной отметки.", "topics": ["market-events"], "country": "INT", "geo_priority": 3, "priority": "medium", "score": 55, "source_name": "coindesk.com", "source_url": "https://coindesk.com/123", "published_at": "2025-03-13T12:00:00Z"}]}
evals.expected_output: JSON с шапкой, одной новостью в международном разделе; не должно быть пустых разделов 'Регулирование РК', 'СНГ' и т.д.
assertions: html does not contain a section title for regulation_kz with no items

evals.name: telegram-segmentation-edge
evals.prompt: Build a digest with 15 articles (each with ~100-word summaries) and verify telegram segments are properly split. Input: large array of 15 articles spanning all sections, each with ~100-word summary. Use realistic data with all required fields.
evals.expected_output: Несколько telegram-сегментов, каждый <= 4000 символов; никакой блок публикации не разорван между сегментами; промежуточные сегменты содержат маркер «продолжение далее»
assertions: all but the last segment contain the continuation marker 'продолжение далее' or '(продолжение)'
no article title appears twice across all segments combined
